_purpose: Per-repo CLAUDE.md interface contract: heading anchors that agents and cross-repo tooling depend on. Checked by scripts/check-claude-md-contract.py via the claude-md-contract reusable workflow (wire it into a pre-commit hook locally if you want earlier feedback — not wired by default). Anchors match case-insensitively as substrings of any heading, so 'Stack' matches 'Stack & Commands'.
_rule: Removing or renaming one of these headings requires updating this contract in the same commit. Add repo-specific anchors freely; keep the set cheap (anchors only — no content parity at the per-repo tier).

referenced_by: six-section standalone contract — 'which database does staging use?' must be answerable from CLAUDE.md alone
six-section standalone contract — Doppler project/config names-only inventory
